Bash(node -e "const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const pool = new Pool\({ connectionString: 'postgresql://postgres:MerinoTrueba17@db.kcfvjorpgucdrbjbfdef.supabase.co:5432/postgres', ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }\); pool.query\('SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = \\'public\\' ORDER BY tablename'\).then\(r => { console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.tablename\).join\(', '\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
